steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: We're told to assume P6 gave equal actual ratings to abstract and cubist paintings. We need to infer what the graph implies about the model's predicted ratings for P6 on these two styles.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The graph shows different model-participant correlations for P6 in the two styles; under the prompt's assumption that P6's reported ratings were equal, that difference supports that the model's predicted ratings differed by style.

So P6's predicted ratings for abstract and cubist paintings would differ from one another.

A is correct.
